title: Facebook, troppa visibilità a estremisti e complottisti: ecco come impatta Meta sulle elezioni
snippet: This article discusses a research study by Professor Fabio Giglietto of the University of Urbino, published on January 9, 2026, which analyzed over 2.5 million Facebook posts and concluded that Facebook's algorithm penalizes institutional political visibility and promotes anti-European, pro-Russian, and conspiracy extremist views.
description: An ansa.it article discussing a research study by Professor Fabio Giglietto of the University of Urbino, published on January 9, 2026, which analyzed Facebook's algorithmic impact on political visibility and extremist content.

title: lumsanews.it
description: The article reports on research co-authored by Fabio Giglietto from the University of Urbino Carlo Bo, analyzing how Facebook and Instagram platforms contribute to the visibility of extremist and conspiracy content, particularly concerning European elections.
